warnings: No LinkedIn positions/experience file was detected in the export.

intro.desired: Staff Engineer / Team Lead | Checkout Reliability | Backend & Platform Engineering
Based in Germany, originally from Lithuania.

about.current: I'm a seasoned full-stack software engineer, specializing in PHP, JavaScript, GO and various other technologies. Leveraging extensive experience as a senior developer and team lead, my expertise lies in creating solutions that are not only tailored to client's immediate needs but also scalable and future-proof. I'm dedicated to effective collaboration, risk management, and building enduring systems.
about.desired:
I lead checkout at SCAYLE with a backend and platform focus on reliability, observability, and high-availability commerce systems.

My work is strongest where scale meets operational pain: noisy alerts, brittle flows, unclear ownership, or systems that only look fine until traffic arrives. I like turning those edges into calmer production systems and clearer engineering ownership.

Before SCAYLE, I rebuilt search at anwalt.de and later stepped into broader platform and team leadership work. Before that, I led delivery for Atobi at Solutionlab while staying hands-on with architecture and execution.

I value direct communication, pragmatic architecture, and software that keeps working under pressure.

added.title: Staff Engineer / Team Lead (Checkout)
added.description:
Leading checkout with a backend and platform focus inside a commerce platform processing more than EUR 6.5B yearly.
Led checkout execution across architecture, delivery, and operational quality.
Owned on-call quality and observability for payment-critical flows.
Helped prepare and operate checkout during Black Friday 2025 peak traffic with zero downtime in the domain I was responsible for.

added.title: Senior Software Engineer (Checkout)
added.description:
Worked hands-on on checkout throughput, reliability, and multi-tenant commerce behavior.
Helped rebuild checkout from a legacy implementation into a Laravel and RoadRunner architecture with clearer flow control.
Took on checkout on-call and went deep on observability, production debugging, and error reduction.

added.title: Senior Software Engineer Team Lead
added.description:
Led a small platform-oriented team while staying hands-on across backend, DevOps, and architecture for Germany's largest legal marketplace.
Owned delivery across backend, DevOps, and technical direction.
Improved CI/CD and deployment safety while mentoring engineers and raising engineering quality.

added.title: Senior Software Developer
added.description:
Senior backend and full-stack engineer on search and marketplace capabilities for a high-traffic legal platform.
Rebuilt anwalt.de search around GraphQL, geolocation, aggregations, and range filters for a marketplace serving millions of users.
Earned promotion into the lead role after owning one of the clearest technical improvement tracks in the product.
Building platform features and APIs used by legal professionals and consumers.
Migrating legacy code into more maintainable services and flows.
Implementing advanced search behavior on top of Elasticsearch.

added.title: Senior Software Engineer Team Lead
added.description:
Team lead and hands-on engineer for Atobi and other retail products delivered by a dev house for startup and enterprise clients.
Led the migration of Atobi from a prototype stack into a Laravel API, React frontend, and mobile delivery architecture.
Designed a reusable gamification system that became part of how multiple products approached engagement and calls to action.
Scaled the team from 3 to 10 engineers while bridging client product vision with technical feasibility.
Leading the delivery team while staying hands-on with architecture and implementation.
Building offline-first and real-time retail app behavior for enterprise client rollouts.
Acting as the technical counterpart for a startup client that needed both execution and product-level translation.
Projects: Atobi - retail employee platform for brands like Nike and PVH Nordic; EffectiveRetail - all-in-one retail management solution

added.title: Senior Web Developer
added.description:
Senior backend engineer on a fast-moving retail startup account inside a dev house setup.
Joined to build backend services for a retail startup and moved into the lead role within two months.
Developing backend services and APIs for retail platform features.

added.title: Full Stack Engineer
added.description:
Full-stack engineer on betting systems where correctness, latency, and transaction handling mattered more than brochure features.
Built features for real-time betting products where financial correctness and operational discipline were non-negotiable.
Worked under a stricter TDD culture than most web teams, which sharpened how I approached safety and regression risk.
Building and maintaining online betting product flows.
Writing test-heavy code for real-time financial and account behavior.
Projects: Olybet - online sports betting platform

added.title: Senior Software Engineer Team Lead
added.description:
Team lead for distributed delivery across ERP, CRM, and cross-platform product work for international clients.
Led a distributed team of 10 engineers across ERP and CRM projects with web, mobile, and desktop delivery.
Owned architecture and delivery for enterprise products that mixed product strategy, project leadership, and implementation.
Leading distributed engineering execution across the full project lifecycle.
Architecting ERP and CRM systems while staying involved in implementation detail.
Projects: Columbina - enterprise ERP system; Olivia - CRM platform for sales teams

added.title: Senior Software Engineer
added.description:
Senior engineer across full-stack product work for enterprise clients.
Moved from senior engineer into the lead role within roughly three months.
Developing full-stack web applications and APIs for enterprise client work.

added.title: Full Stack Engineer
added.description:
Full-stack engineer on warehouse and logistics systems for automotive e-commerce.
Built warehouse workflow and shipping integrations for an automotive spare-parts commerce platform.
Developing logistics automation and internal workflow systems.
Integrating external shipping providers such as DPD, DHL, and UPS.
Projects: Ecu.de - automotive spare-parts e-commerce and warehouse platform

added.title: Ruby on Rails Developer
added.description:
Rails developer on a campaign and voter-registration platform.
Delivered full-stack Rails work for a voter registration and campaign management system.
Building and maintaining Rails product features end to end.
Projects: Voter registration and campaign management platform

added.title: PHP Web Developer
added.description:
Early-career PHP engineer working inside SharePoint-heavy enterprise and government environments.
Built a government education resource-sharing platform inside a SharePoint enterprise setup.
Developing PHP applications integrated with SharePoint workflows and data.
Projects: Government education resource-sharing platform

baseline.about: I'm a seasoned full-stack software engineer, specializing in PHP, JavaScript, GO and various other technologies. Leveraging extensive experience as a senior developer and team lead, my expertise lies in creating solutions that are not only tailored to client's immediate needs but also scalable and future-proof. I'm dedicated to effective collaboration, risk management, and building enduring systems.
